metadata.reference: G. A. Ermolaev, Yu. V. Stebunov, A. A. Vyshnevyy, D. E. Tatarkin, D. I. Yakubovsky, S. M. Novikov, D. G. Baranov, T. Shegai, A. Y. Nikitin, A. V. Arsenin, V. S. Volkov. Broadband optical properties of monolayer and bulk MoS2. NPJ 2D Mater. Appl., 4, 21 (2020) (Numerical data kindly provided by Georgy Ermolaev)
metadata.comments: Broadband optical constants of monolayer MoS<sub>2</sub> on SiO<sub>2</sub>/Si substrate were measured by spectroscopic ellipsometry in the spectral range 290–3300 nm. Tauc-Lorentz oscillators were used in ellipsometry model to describe the optical response of excitons.
